title: Blood moon pvp
description: Red colour themed pvp texture pack.

# Blood Moon PVP
Red colour themed minecraft pvp texture pack. Better experience for Crystal and Anchor pvp (CPVP)

- Retextured Weapons,Tools
- Retextured Crystal, Anchor, Glowstone
- Dark and Red colour GUI
- Transparent Hot bar
- Animated Totem
- Small Handhold items
- Low Fire, Low Shield
- Small particles
- New Start Screen for Minecraft
